title: Allow Portal GUIs
description: This mod allows you to open extra guis inside of a nether portal, which is impossible to do in vanilla minecraft.
body:
# Allow Portal GUIs
This mod allows you to open different guis inside of a nether portal, which is impossible to do in vanilla minecraft.

Since minecraft 26.1, this mod is no longer needed for opening the chat but it does allow you to open your inventory and other guis.
